import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if in_num
        result = list.push(result, val * sign)
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      in_num = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, val * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  let len = nums.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < len
    let v = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v > t
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
